title: Lute compiled IR artifact (irVersion 0.6.x)
description:
JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the WHOLE compiled Lute IR artifact emitted by `lute compile` (crates/lute-compile, ir.rs `Artifact`). One artifact is produced per `.lute` document; a project's engine unions the per-document `relations`/`rules`/`seedFacts`/`entities`/`enums`/`prereqEdges` across every artifact exactly as it unions the command streams.

VERSION-NEGOTIATION POLICY (spec §4.1, A9): an engine gates on `irVersion` by MAJOR.MINOR — it MUST accept any artifact whose `irVersion` major.minor it implements and MUST refuse one from a newer major.minor (the PATCH component is an advisory, backward-compatible refinement and never gates). `lute` (the language version) is informational for the runtime and does not gate parsing. Forward compatibility: an engine MUST IGNORE unknown OBJECT FIELDS (new optional fields are added append-only within a minor line) so a newer PATCH artifact still loads on an older engine of the same major.minor; an engine MUST treat an unknown command `kind` as an ERROR (a new command kind is a real capability the engine cannot fake). Field declaration order in an artifact is a byte-stability contract of the compiler but carries no semantics for a consumer.

kind.description: document kind discriminator (dsl 0.2.0 §2/§3.1); read first — it selects `meta`'s shape.

lute.description: language-version pin (informational for the runtime), e.g. "0.6.1".

irVersion.description: IR schema version the engine gates on (major.minor), e.g. "0.6.1".

capabilityVersion.description: plugin-system §13 capability snapshot stamp (a content hash); a consumer may refuse a mismatched snapshot.

state.description: the folded init/type table (§4.1); may be empty but is always present.

entities.description: merged relational entity kinds; omitted entirely when empty.

enums.description: merged relational enums; omitted when empty.

relations.description: merged relation declarations; omitted when empty.

seedFacts.description: merged seed facts (vocabulary order); omitted when empty.

rules.description: merged Datalog rules as DATA (vocabulary order); omitted when empty. Lute runs no fixpoint (D1).

prereqEdges.description: advisory raw `after` prerequisite edges (connectivity T13); omitted when empty.

injected.description: true when the compiler inserted this command; false marks an author command a rule would have injected (a conflict).

by.description: the named injection rule responsible, e.g. "auto-anchor-on-show".

provenance.description: §4.3 injection provenance (lute_check::inject::Provenance): why an implicit command exists.

source.description: §4.3 component source stamp on component-expanded records (D8).

exprNode.description: Portable CEL expression AST (IR A7, expr.rs). Serialized as an UNTAGGED serde enum — each variant is a bare object distinguished by its keys. A plain JSON walker evaluates it; the parallel `raw`/string field carries the source CEL for debug. Absent whenever the CEL slot was empty or fell outside the closed Lute-CEL profile (dsl §8.4).

lit.description: scalar literal; every numeric CEL literal collapses to a double.

celPair.description: A CEL slot's raw text plus its optional portable lowered `expr` (IR A7). `expr` is absent for empty/out-of-profile CEL.

placeholder.description: One {{…}} interpolation placeholder (IR A3), internally tagged on `kind` (lowercase). The runtime substitutes it against live state; the enclosing text/label keeps the verbatim {{…}} marker.

role.description: :line role (§4.4). Voiced roles (dialogue/voiceover/offscreen) carry a voiceKey; monologue/narration do not.

members.description: closed member set; ABSENT for `open: engine` kinds (the engine mints members).

tier.description: effective write tier for base relations (default `run`); ABSENT for `derive: true` (a derived relation has no write tier).

key.description: 0-based functional-key arg indices (§4); absent when undeclared.

args.description: ground literals as strings; bools as "true"/"false". Never "_".

termEntry.description: One rule term (dsl 0.3.0 §7.1), tagged on `kind`. Bools lower to a Const with value "true"/"false".

atomEntry.description: One rule atom: a relation applied to terms (dsl 0.3.0 §7.1).

bodyEntry.description: One rule body literal (dsl 0.3.0 §7.1), tagged on `kind`: a positive/negated atom, a CEL guard, or a term comparison.

raw.description: the rule's original source text, for engine diagnostics.

ruleEntry.description: One Datalog rule (dsl 0.3.0 §7.1), emitted as STRUCTURED data. Lute performs NO evaluation (D1); the engine runs the least-fixpoint over this rule set.

node.description: the contributing node's canonical key: a scene's {character}.{episodeId} or a quest's <quest id>.

after.description: the RAW declared `after` formula text — unresolved, unvalidated CEL.

prereqEdgeEntry.description: One advisory prerequisite edge (connectivity spec §2.6, T13): a single node's raw declared `after`, verbatim.

questMeta.description: Quest-kind envelope meta (dsl 0.2.0 §6.1). MAY serialize as {} when neither key is authored. Present when `kind` == "quest".

domain.description: enum member domain; an implicit branch/quest-state slot appends "unset".

default.description: initial value (any JSON scalar/array/object), integral-collapsed. Absent when the slot has no default (maybe-unset).

provenance.description: "branch:<id>" for an implicit choice slot, "quest:<id>" for a reserved quest slot; absent for an author-declared slot.

stateEntry.description: One folded state slot (§4.1): the engine's init/type table entry.

effectSource.description: The origin of an Effect's value (IR A12, untagged).

bridgeResult.description: read the named key off the bridge call's returned result object.

anyOf.description: a bare literal value (manifest scalar), integral-collapsed.

path.description: fully-resolved dotted state path (scope + segments, fromAttr already substituted at compile time).

effect.description: A resolved plugin state-write binding (IR A12): where a bridge result / increment / literal lands. The runtime applies it after the bridge call — no manifest lookup, no per-plugin knowledge.

when.description: raw guard CEL; present only when the option is guarded.

exit.description: leaves the hub loop when taken.

hubOption.description: One <hub> option: a choice option plus always-present once/exit revisit flags.

test.description: raw arm guard CEL (debug); the executable form is `expr`.

body.description: addr of the objective's completion-body segment; ALWAYS present, `null` when the body is empty.

objectiveEntry.description: One objective inlined in QuestCmd.objectives (dsl 0.2.0 §6.4). Declaration data only; the engine derives completion (all non-optional objectives done ⇒ quest complete).

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

costume.description: A1 schema-only: resolved costume id; never emitted until the cast plugin ships.

cmdSprite.description: An authored ::auto or an injected sprite command (§7.4); injected records carry `provenance` in the stamp.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

value.description: raw RHS text; the executable form is `expr`.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

cmdAssert.description: One asserted fact delta (dsl 0.3.0 §5). DATA only — the engine applies it as a positive write to the relation's fact set.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

cmdRetract.description: One retracted fact delta (dsl 0.3.0 §5). The engine applies it as a negative write; "_" positions are a bulk wildcard the engine resolves.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.
the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

cmdHub.description: <hub> (§7.3.2): a choice plus revisit semantics; re-presentation is a runtime property of the hub kind (no backward jump emitted).

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

cmdJump.description: Unconditional control-flow jump. Carries no stamp.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

at.description: the barrier time (authored duration, else max resolved clip end).

cmdBarrier.description: A timeline join point (§11.4). Carries no stamp.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

cmdQuest.description: <quest> declaration head (dsl 0.2.0 §6.3). A declaration head: objective completion bodies and <on> arms follow as their own addressed records.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

body.description: addr of the action body segment.

cmdOn.description: <on> event-condition-action record (dsl 0.2.0 §4, §6.6): an independent event rule.

addr.description: the record's resolved address (§4.2), unique within the artifact; jump/converge/target/body fields point at these.

fields.description: resolved directive attrs, typed via the manifest AttrDecls.

effects.description: resolved plugin state-write bindings (IR A12); absent when the directive declares none.

command.description: One command record (§4.4), internally tagged on `kind`. An engine MUST error on an unknown `kind` (version-negotiation policy, top-level description); it MUST ignore unknown FIELDS within a known record.

artifactMeta.description: Kind-polymorphic envelope meta (untagged): SceneMeta when kind==scene, QuestMeta when kind==quest. The top-level allOf pins which by `kind`.
